created_templates.name: tmp_quant_20260602b_roc_ema_fast_guard_long_v1
created_templates.thesis: ROC/EMA base winner with tighter stop and faster trend to reduce drawdown without losing compounding.

created_templates.name: tmp_quant_20260602b_ema_roc_rsi_fast_quality_long_v1
created_templates.thesis: EMA/ROC/RSI winner family with faster trend and controlled RSI ceiling for better Pareto balance.

created_templates.name: tmp_quant_20260602b_dual_ema_roc_rsi_alignment_long_v1
created_templates.thesis: Dual EMA alignment keeps compounding trends but exits faster when short trend loses structure.

created_templates.name: tmp_quant_20260602b_bbands_roc_quality_long_v1
created_templates.thesis: Bollinger middle continuation plus ROC requires volatility quality and momentum together.

created_templates.thesis: ADX regime allows the high-return ROC/EMA family only when trend strength is present.

created_templates.name: tmp_quant_20260602b_ma_breakout_trend_exit_long_v1
created_templates.thesis: Moving-average breakout keeps the crossover reference but exits with long trend loss.
